hero_subtitle: Vibrant, colourful and abundantly generous — buffet catering designed to impress and satisfy.
samples_intro: A taste of what’s possible. Cold buffets and picnic spreads, hot lunch menus by region, and full event-style buffets for larger occasions. Each one is a starting point for the conversation. Tap any menu to expand.
cta_subtitle: Tell us about your event and we will create a menu that works perfectly for you.

samples.title: Ploughman's
samples.blurb: Our simplest cold buffet — ideal for drop-off lunches. A proper British ploughman's with quality breads, cured meats, classic British cheeses and homemade pickles. Easy, generous, never disappointing.

items: Slices of gammon, grilled chicken breast, or houmous and falafel

samples.title: The Coronation
samples.blurb: A classic English cold buffet built around Coronation Chicken — comfortable, familiar flavours perfect for garden lunches and relaxed receptions.

items: Hard boiled eggs with smoked salmon & dill cream cheese
Mixed leaf salad with a classic French vinaigrette

samples.title: Simple Greek
samples.blurb: Bright Mediterranean flavours served cold and easy to graze on. Great for summer lunches, drinks receptions with substance, or any time a lighter, sunnier buffet is wanted.

items: Pita bread with assorted dips: babaganoush, red pepper hummus and tzatziki
Garlic, lemon & oregano marinated grilled chicken breast
Baklava, or a cut fruit platter

samples.title: Mediterranean Antipasti
samples.blurb: A grazing-style cold buffet inspired by the antipasti table — cured meats, roasted vegetables, beautiful breads and bright salads, laid out for guests to help themselves.

items: Slices of garlic & rosemary grilled chicken breast
Selection of breads including homemade focaccia with rosemary & sea salt

samples.title: Festive Christmas Buffet
samples.blurb: A traditional Christmas cold spread — roast turkey, glazed gammon, festive sides and a selection of our own Christmas baking. Perfect for office parties, family gatherings or any winter celebration.

items: Gammon glazed with grainy mustard & marmalade
Mixed leaf salad with red onion and pomegranate seeds
“Light” coleslaw of red cabbage, carrot, fennel & parsley with a lemon vinaigrette
A selection of our Christmas cookies and cakes including mini mince pies, Christmas cake, cinnamon & almond shortbread stars and orange & spice gooey chocolate brownie bites

samples.title: Summer Garden Party
samples.blurb: Our more generous summer cold spread — designed for relaxed afternoons in the garden. Cured and grilled meats, bright salads, British cheeses and proper homemade puddings.

items: Assorted British and continental sliced meats
Grilled lemon, garlic & herb chicken breast
Roasted cherry tomato, kalamata olive, feta & basil tart
New potato salad with a sun-dried tomato & basil dressing
Mixed leaf, strawberry and herb salad with a fruit vinaigrette
Selection of British cheeses with chutneys
Lemon cream tartlets with fresh berries
Gooey chocolate brownies with chocolate dipped strawberries

samples.title: Ham & Salmon
samples.blurb: A more elegant cold buffet built around two star centrepieces — home-baked glazed ham and poached salmon. Quietly impressive, ideal for milestone lunches and refined receptions.

items: Home baked glazed ham with assorted chutneys
Poached salmon with a lemon & herb yogurt sauce
Spinach salad with avocado, orange, toasted slivered almonds & a citrus vinaigrette
Chunky vegetable salad with lemon & parsley
Individual pavlovas with fresh berries & lemon cream, or chocolate hazelnut cream & hazelnut praline

samples.title: Mexican DIY Wraps
samples.blurb: A relaxed, hands-on hot lunch — lively flavours and a build-your-own approach that always gets the room talking. Brilliant for offices and informal gatherings.

items: Wraps, cheese, pico de gallo salsa, guacamole

samples.title: Indian
samples.blurb: Aromatic, gently spiced and full of warmth — an Indian-inspired hot lunch with a meat and a vegetarian curry alongside basmati rice.

samples.title: Moroccan
samples.blurb: Fragrant North African tagines paired with jewelled couscous — comforting, lightly spiced, and beautiful on the table.

items: Chicken, preserved lemon and olive tagine
Chickpea, butternut squash and spinach tagine

samples.title: Mediterranean
samples.blurb: A classic European hot lunch — a French-leaning meat main, a hearty vegetarian alternative and a comforting root vegetable mash.

samples.title: Pakistani
samples.blurb: A rich, slow-cooked lamb keema alongside a vegetable curry and basmati rice — deeply flavoured but never heavy.

samples.title: Persian
samples.blurb: Bright Persian flavours — herbs, citrus, pomegranate and warm spice — with a fresh seasonal salad and a buttery dip alongside.

items: Apple, sumac, red onion and pomegranate salad
Butterbean and za'atar dip with flatbread crisps

samples.title: North African
samples.blurb: Smoky paprika chicken with a chickpea, spinach and saffron stew — full of colour and warmth, with flatbread or couscous to soak it all up.

samples.title: Lebanese
samples.blurb: Vibrant, fresh Levantine flavours — shawarma and falafel with all the trimmings. Brilliant for a hands-on lunch where guests build their own plates.

samples.title: Thai
samples.blurb: Fragrant Thai curries — a yellow chicken curry alongside a vegetable green curry — served with cooling cucumber salad and Thai scented rice.

samples.title: Italian
samples.blurb: A proper Italian hot lunch — a generous lasagne with a vegan porcini or soya alternative, garlic bread and a chunky seasonal salad.

items: Beef lasagne, or beef & pork lasagne

samples.title: Late Summer Family Style Grazing
samples.blurb: A simple marquee and village hall transformed to reflect the personalities and talents of the hosts. From hand drawn menu cards to black and gold striped table runners to a bar area complete with jars and metal tubs of drinks, the atmosphere was fun and contemporary. A bespoke grazing menu let guests help themselves to a little of this and a little of that.

items: Bespoke family-style grazing menu featuring the client's favourite dishes — please get in touch for full details
A selection of 'bring & share' puddings made by family & friends
Bagels with smoked salmon & cream cheese
Bagels with home cured salt beef and a selection of mustards

samples.title: Family Style Summer Picnic
samples.blurb: The extensive grounds of a gothic style country manor house. Various outbuildings added rustic charm, as did the barn dotted with fairy lights for the evening festivities. A ceremony on the terrace was followed by a drinks reception, then the meal in an open-air tent where guests sat at picnic tables.

items: Mozzarella with basil & a sprinkle of chilli

courses.course: Main course — platters of roasted & cured meats
items: Gammon with a honey, mustard & marmalade glaze
Roasted cherry tomato, kalamata olive, feta & basil
A selection of British and continental cheeses
Lemony chick pea, feta & herb salad
New potato, sun-dried tomato & basil salad
